post_batch_commit_verify_session.purpose: Verify each of the 9 fix commits via dogfood trace evidence (trace-patch-replay at fixed user params + S8 live + B38-state simulation) before deciding revert.
post_batch_commit_verify_session.methodology: User-tunable params (hot_list_n=10, default seed, fresh mode) held fixed. Each commit's revert simulated via llm_replay --patch on the baseline narr-1 trace; deterministic commits verified via S8 live and B38-sim ghost filter observation.

561101a.evidence: P2 trace-patch (= ARS block removed) → arg variants 5→8 increase. Reverting this OR 1d5042d removes the same ARS block; both keep.

5e05b9b.evidence: P3a trace-patch (= file__write + rag.operation__drop_source removed from tools[]) → mcp_search routing 0/10 unchanged. Pre-fix seed at n=10 still doesn't put mcp_search in top-10 (position 12 → cap-out). Orthogonal to W6 regression.

29a0c31.evidence: S8 live dogfood → judge_phase finished, score=1.0, no validation_error

1d5042d.evidence: P2 trace-patch → arg variants 5→8 increase (hallucination worsens without ARS). Functioning.

bfeb9f8.evidence: B38-sim run web.log: 'skipping ghost alias mcp.server__search — not found in current registry'. Ghost filter empirically rejecting fake names.

16b439c.evidence: S8 live dogfood → scenario yaml + fixture produce valid evidence (= rubric pass)

b1ca51a.evidence: B38-sim run: skill__mcp_search (empty input_schema) passed ghost filter and appeared as direct alias in tools[]. Empty-schema acceptance functioning.

f48333c.evidence: Live test confirmed: B38-state simulation (action_usage.jsonl with skill__mcp_search history) → mcp_search routes correctly. Fresh state (= post-f48333c) → routes to mcp.server__* guesses. f48333c does not cause the regression — it removes the action_usage masking that previously hid a latent cold-start wrapper-discovery gap. Methodology fix correct per care-boundary; latent gap is separate fix domain (cognitive bias attractor).

b4daeb1.evidence: P1 trace-patch (= direct_llm + read_local_files removed from ARS) → mcp_search routing 0/10 unchanged. B39-W6-F1 initial hypothesis (= ARS expansion shifted routing landscape) REFUTED by trace-patch-replay.

w6_r_web_regression_real_root_cause.name: Cold-start wrapper-discovery cognitive bias (Class A attractor)
w6_r_web_regression_real_root_cause.trace_evidence_summary: When skill__mcp_search is NOT in tools[] direct aliases (= cold-start, fresh action_usage state at hot_list_n=10), LLM never calls list_actions(category=['skill']) to discover it. Instead 100% of 10 baseline replays routed to mcp.server__* category guesses (mcp.server__search / mcp.tool__mcp_search.* / list_actions(category=['mcp.server']))
w6_r_web_regression_real_root_cause.cognitive_path: User prompt 'mcp_search スキルで...' → LLM associates 'mcp_search' with mcp.server category (= mcp prefix overlap with mcp.server category description 'invoke to list this server's tools') → skill category never tried
w6_r_web_regression_real_root_cause.post_batch_context_analysis: 5 parallel sonnet info-gathering (SP / wrapper desc / past batch / trace / care boundary) confirmed: (a) Router SP has no guidance for 'user says X スキル → list_actions(category=[skill])', (b) ROUTING RULE (ABSOLUTE) only fires when user message contains literal qualified action_name, (c) Same pattern observed in B35-B38 cold-start gap findings, (d) Per care-boundary.md §1 'The LLM doesn't have to guess what exists', this IS Reyn OS structural responsibility
w6_r_web_regression_real_root_cause.fix_layer_recommendation: structural (pre-call context) OR gray (SP MUST rule). Sonnet 5 ladder cheap-first: (1) observe trace [done], (2) structural skill-list inject in router context, (3) SP MUST rule 'X スキル' → list_actions(category=['skill']), (4) list_actions description example enrichment. Carry-over to B40.

principles_applied_in_post_batch_verify: P6 verify-first / reproduce-first (= bug reproduced on current HEAD 5c79bd7 before any revert proposal)
P16 pre-fix multi-agent context analysis (= 5 parallel sonnet info-gathering before fix design)
User-tunable params fixed in comparison (= new memory entry, established this session)
Verify fix via replay before land (= existing memory, applied via trace-patch-replay)
Pre-conclusion observation checklist (= triggered when writing per-commit verdict)

carry_over_to_b40.description: Cold-start wrapper-discovery cognitive bias: LLM doesn't try list_actions(category=['skill']) when direct alias absent. 100% N=10 reproducible at user config hot_list_n=10 + fresh action_usage.
fix_candidates: (b) SP MUST rule for X スキル prompt → category=['skill']
carry_over_to_b40.fix_order: cheap-first per intervention layer ladder (Sonnet 5 recommendation: observe → structural → SP → description)

carry_over_to_b40.description: S4 explicit_skill_invocation_word_stats V→R: LLM picked skill__direct_llm over word_stats_demo. Hypothesis: b4daeb1 added direct_llm to ARS with {text} schema, easier to use than word_stats_demo's more specific schema. Same class as W2-S7 eval competition.
carry_over_to_b40.note: Not a fix bug per se; design consideration for ARS visibility ordering

carry_over_to_b40.description: S7 eval_run_direct_llm V→R: LLM picked skill__direct_llm over skill__eval. Same family as W1-S4.
s-fp11-1 anti-optimism REFUTED. Scenario design flaw: invalid-spec prompt was natural-language vague, LLM reinterpreted as valid build. Recommend rewrite with structurally invalid DSL.
narr-3 skill_builder loop_limit_exceeded (design_artifacts ×5). B38 was V. May correlate with ARS expansion (b4daeb1) but not directly confirmed; needs N≥3 retest.
